nasb.text: and what is the surpassing greatness of His power toward us who believe. These are in accordance with the working of the strength of His might

esv.text: and what is the immeasurable greatness of his power toward us who believe, according to the working of his great might

cnv.text: 神照著他強大的力量，向我們信他的人顯出的能力，是何等的浩大。

ccb.text: 并且祂在我们这些信的人身上所运行的能力是何等浩大。

csbs.text: 并且在我们这些相信之人的身上，照着他力量的权能作为，他能力的无限伟大到底是什么。
